focus: RQ3 mode completeness + mode matrix (no checkModeCompleteness; reachability-only root of AL1; two-sided completeness; default_policy enum holds create/design/deep; declared_modes:[] exempts doctor/memory)
noveltyJustification: Locates AL1 precisely (no mode check; missing-file reachability only); designs a two-sided topology-aware check gated on a mode_matrix whose default_policy enum legitimates the three real default policies instead of flattening them.

ruledOut.approach: Force every router to support both :auto and :confirm
ruledOut.reason: Contradicts legitimate single-mode/zero-mode topologies (doctor/update, memory/*) and 012 design intent.
